commands.review_summary:
The branch adds terminal main-session transcript freshness checks in CLI, Gateway, and auto-reply implicit reuse paths, and updates core, Gateway, and Telegram transcript writers/tests to advance registry markers after managed appends.

PR surface: Source +395, Tests +830. Total +1225 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence repro path: seed a terminal main-session registry row whose transcript mtime is newer than updatedAt, then resolve an implicit main session; the contributor also supplied after-fix terminal proof, but I did not execute it in this read-only review.
